metadata.title: Protection Levels
metadata.description: This dataset contains information about various protection levels associated with interaction rules.

protection_levels.name: Virtually Complete Protection
protection_levels.notes: There is virtually complete protection against practically instantanious propagation of explosion by ground shock, blast, flame, and high velocity projections. The stocks are likely to be serviceable.

protection_levels.name: High Degree of Protection
protection_levels.notes: There is a high degree of protection against practically instantaneous propagation of explosion by ground shock, blast, flame, and high velocity projections. Most of the stocks are likely to be servicable.

protection_levels.name: Limited Degree of Protection
protection_levels.notes: There is only a limited degree of protection against practically instantanious propagation of explosion by ground shock, flame, and high velocity projections. The stocks are likely to be heavily damaged and rendered unserviceable.
